UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user profile information and subscription status.

isPremium.description: Whether the user has a premium subscription.

isPendingVerification.description: Whether the user's payment is pending verification.

paymentProofUrl.description: URL to the payment proof image.

password.description: The user's password (stored for display purposes).

providerData.description: List of auth providers linked to the account.

dailyGoalMinutes.description: The user's daily study goal in minutes.

studyStats.description: Map of module names to minutes spent studying them.

lastStudyDate.description: The last date the user studied (used for daily resets).

monthlyStudyStats.description: Map of module names to minutes spent studying them in the current month.

lastStudyMonth.description: The last month the user studied (used for monthly resets).

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles indexed by their Firebase Auth UID.

/test/{docId}.description: Collection used for connection health checks.
